testcase.name: test_get_sent_messages_filter_sent

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase_c_p1.py:67: in test_get_sent_messages_filter_sent assert r.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 500: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
